run121_note: No new JSON-fixable recommendations. All Run-119 audit recs processed. New finding: DATASET_CONFLICT blocks CONF_PARADOX expansion (100d vs 965-trade dataset contradict on 80-90% conf). REC3 (R:R geometry) at conf=82% still deferred as code change.

skipped_this_run.reason: BELOW_THRESHOLD: confidence=71% < 75% auto-apply threshold. Logged as TRACKING rule for monitoring.
skipped_this_run.note: Added HYPE_SHORT_HIGHCONF_VETO_PROBE tracking entry to graduated_rules.json

skipped_this_run.reason: CODE_CHANGE_REQUIRED: Widen HYPE SL to 1.5x ATR requires modifying execution/leverage.py or trading_config.py. Not JSON-fixable.

already_present: record_outcome() BUY/SELL mapping - already applied multi_strategy_main.py:3257

deferred_code_changes.impact: HoldTimeRuleManager neutered - min_hold_hours stuck at manual 3.0. Root cause confirmed Run121: 89% same-candle SL closes cause hold_time_s=0. Fix: max(actual_hold, candle_duration_s) + patch pos.opened_at=sim_dt alongside open_time.

deferred_code_changes.description: Widen HYPE SL to 1.5x ATR minimum. Kelly=-0.167 at current 1.0x ATR. Target R:R >= 1.25 to break even at 44.5% WR.
deferred_code_changes.impact: Kelly -0.167 -> est. -0.05 after SL widening. Reduces SL hit rate from 45.7% to ~38%.

recommendations_from_audit.problem: short_direction_veto_v1 blocks SOL SHORT - exclude_symbols not implemented in matches()
recommendations_from_audit.proposed_fix: Add exclude_symbols field to GraduatedRule.matches() and update short_direction_veto_v1
recommendations_from_audit.skip_reason: Requires code change to graduated_rules.py - already applied per auto_fix_state.json

recommendations_from_audit.problem: btc_short_90plus_boost_v1 has times_applied=0 across all audit runs
recommendations_from_audit.proposed_fix: Add diagnostic logging, investigate rule evaluation path

recommendations_from_audit.problem: record_outcome() passes LONG/SHORT but rules expect BUY/SELL - accuracy tracking broken
recommendations_from_audit.proposed_fix: Convert event.side from LONG/SHORT to BUY/SELL before calling record_outcome()
